015 */
016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.test;
017
018import org.bitcoinj.base.BitcoinNetwork;
019import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.BitcoinExtendedClient;
020import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.JsonRpcException;
021import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.Outpoint;
022import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.SignedRawTransaction;
023import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.UnspentOutput;
024import org.bitcoinj.base.Address;
025import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
026import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
027import org.slf4j.Logger;
028import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
029
030import java.io.IOException;
031import java.util.List;
032import java.util.Map;
033import java.util.stream.Collectors;
034
035/**
036 * FundingSource using RegTest mining, BitcoinExtendedClient (with getRegTestMiningAddress),
037 * and the server's default wallet for accumulating coins.
038 */
039public class RegTestFundingSource implements FundingSource {
040    private final Coin txFee = Coin.valueOf(200_000);
041    private final Integer defaultMaxConf = 9999999;
042    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(RegTestFundingSource.class);
043    protected final BitcoinExtendedClient client;
044
045    public RegTestFundingSource(BitcoinExtendedClient client) {
046        this.client = client;
047    }
048
049    /**
050     * Generate blocks (if necessary) and fund an address with requested amount of BTC.
051     * This will create, sign, and transmit a transaction to fund an address with BTC. This method
052     * does not mine a block to confirm the transaction. A separate call to {@link BitcoinExtendedClient#generateBlocks(int)}
053     * or equivalent must be made to confirm the transaction.
054     *
055     * @param toAddress Address to fund with BTC
056     * @param requestAmount Amount of BTC to "mine" and send (minimum ending balance of toAddress?)
057     * @return The hash of an unconfirmed transaction that provides the funds.
058     */
059    @Override
060    public Sha256Hash requestBitcoin(Address toAddress, Coin requestAmount) throws JsonRpcException, IOException {
061        log.info("requestBitcoin requesting {} for {}", requestAmount.toPlainString(), toAddress);
062        if (requestAmount.value > BitcoinNetwork.MAX_MONEY.value) {
063            throw new IllegalArgumentException("request exceeds MAX_MONEY");
064        }
065
066        // Generate blocks until regTestMiningAddress has enough funds
067        List<UnspentOutput> unspent = mineEnoughFunds(requestAmount);
068        List<Outpoint> inputs = unspentOutputsToOutpoints(unspent);
069        Coin availableToSpend = sumUnspentOutputs(unspent);
070
071        // Create the funding transaction
072        Map<Address, Coin> outputs = calcChange(availableToSpend, requestAmount, toAddress, client.getRegTestMiningAddress());
073        String unsignedTxHex = client.createRawTransaction(inputs, outputs);
074
075        // Sign the funding transaction
076        SignedRawTransaction signingResult = client.signRawTransactionWithWallet(unsignedTxHex);
077        if (!signingResult.isComplete()) {
078            log.error("Unable to complete signing!");
079            log.error("SigningResult: {}", toJson(signingResult));
080        }
081        assert signingResult.isComplete();
082
083        // Send the funding transaction
084        Sha256Hash txid = sendRawTransactionUnlimitedFees(signingResult.getHex());
085        log.info("Funding transaction sent: {}", txid);
086
087        return txid;
088    }
089
090    /**
091     * Create an address and fund it with bitcoin.
092     * This will create, sign, and transmit a transaction to fund an address with BTC. This method
093     * does not mine a block to confirm the transaction. A separate call to {@link BitcoinExtendedClient#generateBlocks(int)}
094     * or equivalent must be made to confirm the transaction.
095     *
096     * @param amount requested amount of BTC
097     * @return Newly created address that will have the requested amount of bitcoin after the next block is mined
098     */
099    @Override
100    public Address createFundedAddress(Coin amount) throws Exception {
101        Address address = client.getNewAddress();
102        requestBitcoin(address, amount);
103        return address;
104    }
105
106    /**
107     * Mine zero or more blocks until {@code availableFunds >= requestedAmount + fee}
108     *
109     * @param requestAmount Funds requested
110     * @return A list of unspent outputs
111     * @throws IOException ISH
112     */
113    private List<UnspentOutput> mineEnoughFunds(Coin requestAmount) throws IOException {
114        Coin neededAmount = requestAmount.plus(txFee);
115
116        List<UnspentOutput> available = availableFunds();
117
118        while (sumUnspentOutputs(available).isLessThan(neededAmount)) {
119            client.generateBlocks(1);
120            available = availableFunds();
121            logMined(neededAmount, available);
122        }
123
124        log.info("mineEnoughFunds: Needed: {} Returned: {}", neededAmount.toPlainString(), sumUnspentOutputs(available).toPlainString());
125
126        return available;
127    }
128
129    private void logMined(Coin needed, List<UnspentOutput> available) throws IOException {
130        int height = client.getBlockCount();
131        log.warn("⛏⛏⛏⛏⛏ Mined {} (blk#{}): Available: {} Needed: {} ⛏⛏⛏⛏⛏",
132                client.getBlockSubsidy(height).toPlainString(),
133                height,
134                sumUnspentOutputs(available).toPlainString(),
135                needed.toPlainString());
136    }
137
138    private Map<Address, Coin> calcChange(Coin availableFunds, Coin amountToSend, Address destAddress, Address changeAddress) {
139        Coin change = availableFunds.minus(amountToSend.plus(txFee));
140        return change.isPositive()
141                ? Map.of(destAddress, amountToSend, changeAddress, change)  // include change output
142                : Map.of(destAddress, amountToSend);                        // no change output
143    }
144
145    /**
146     * Create everything needed to assemble a custom transaction
147     * @param amount Amount of BTC to be available on new address
148     * @return An address, private key, and list of unspent outputs
149     * @throws JsonRpcException
150     * @throws IOException
151     */
152    public TransactionIngredients createIngredients(Coin amount) throws JsonRpcException, IOException {
153        TransactionIngredients ingredients = new TransactionIngredients();
154        Address address = client.getNewAddress();
155        requestBitcoin(address, amount);
156        ingredients.address = address;
157        // Not supported on Descriptor Wallets
158        ingredients.privateKey = client.dumpPrivKey(address);
159        ingredients.outPoints = client.listUnspentOutPoints(address);
160        return ingredients;
161    }
162
163    @Override
164    public void fundingSourceMaintenance() {
165        try {
166            consolidateCoins();
167        } catch (JsonRpcException e) {
168            log.error("exception: ", e);
169            throw new RuntimeException(e);
170        } catch (IOException e) {
171            log.error("exception: ", e);
172            throw new RuntimeException(e);
173        }
174    }
175
176    /**
177     * Collects *all* unspent outputs and sends to the RegTestMiningAddress. No new block is generated afterwards.
178     *
179     * NOTE: This consolidates all coins in the wallet to the RegTestMiningAddress and should only be run
180     * at the end of a test (if you are using wallet addresses in your test)
181     *
182     * Can be used in cleanupSpec() methods of integration tests.
183     *
184     * @see <a href="https://github.com/OmniLayer/OmniJ/issues/50">Issue #50 on GitHub</a>
185     */
186    void consolidateCoins() throws JsonRpcException, IOException {
187        // Get all UTXOs in the servers wallet
188        List<UnspentOutput> unspentOutputs = getSpendable();
189
190        // Check if the amount is large enough to be worth consolidating
191        Coin amountIn = sumUnspentOutputs(unspentOutputs);
192        log.info("We have {} in {} utxos.", amountIn.toPlainString(), unspentOutputs.size());
193        if (unspentOutputs.size() < 10 || amountIn.value <= 10 * txFee.value) {
194            log.info("Not consolidating.");
195            return;
196        }
197
198        // Gather inputs
199        List<Outpoint> inputs = unspentOutputsToOutpoints(unspentOutputs);
200
201        // Send it all to the RegTestMiningAddress
202        Map<Address,Coin> outputs = Map.of(client.getRegTestMiningAddress(), amountIn.subtract(txFee));
203
204        String unsignedTxHex = client.createRawTransaction(inputs, outputs);
205        SignedRawTransaction signingResult = client.signRawTransactionWithWallet(unsignedTxHex);
206
207        boolean complete = signingResult.isComplete();
208        if (!complete) {
209            log.error("Unable to complete signing on consolidate coins transaction.");
210            log.error("SigningResult: {}", toJson(signingResult));
211        }
212        assert complete;
213
214        String signedTxHex = signingResult.getHex();
215        Sha256Hash txid = sendRawTransactionUnlimitedFees(signedTxHex);
216        log.warn("⭄⭄⭄⭄⭄⭄⭄ Consolidating transaction sent, txid = {}", txid);
217    }
218
219    private String toJson(SignedRawTransaction signingResult) {
220        return client.getMapper().valueToTree(signingResult).toPrettyString();
221    }
222
223    /**
224     * Get available funds in the RegTestMiningAddress
225     */
226    private List<UnspentOutput> availableFunds() throws IOException {
227        return getSpendable(client.getRegTestMiningAddress());
228    }
229
230    /**
231     * Get all available funds in the server-side wallet
232     */
233    private List<UnspentOutput> getSpendable() throws  JsonRpcException, IOException {
234        return client.listUnspent(1, defaultMaxConf, null, null);
235    }
236
237    /**
238     * Get all available funds in a specific address in the server-side wallet
239     */
240    private List<UnspentOutput> getSpendable(Address address) throws  JsonRpcException, IOException {
241        return client.listUnspent(1, defaultMaxConf, address)
242                .stream()
243                .filter(out -> out.isSpendable() && out.isSafe())
244                .collect(Collectors.toList());
245    }
246
247    private List<Outpoint> unspentOutputsToOutpoints(List<UnspentOutput> unspentOutputs) {
248        return unspentOutputs.stream()
249                .map(output -> new Outpoint(output.getTxid(), output.getVout()))   // map from UnspentOutput to Outpoint
250                .collect(Collectors.toList());
251    }
252
253    private Coin sumUnspentOutputs(List<UnspentOutput> unspentOutputs) {
254        return unspentOutputs.stream()
255                .map(UnspentOutput::getAmount)
256                .reduce(Coin.ZERO, Coin::add);
257    }
258
259    private Sha256Hash sendRawTransactionUnlimitedFees(String hexTx) throws IOException {
260        return client.sendRawTransaction(hexTx, null, null);
261    }
262}
